scenario.key_phrase: Can you tell me about EMI options?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Hello! Good morning, main Priya bol rahi hun PhysicsWallah se. Am I speaking to Saurabh?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Haan ji, yes this is Saurabh. Good morning!

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Thank you for showing interest in PW courses! Saurabh, main aapko batana chahti hun ki hum India's most affordable EdTech platform hain. First, may I know which class you're currently in?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: I'm in Class 12 right now, just started this year.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Perfect! Class 12 is a crucial year. Saurabh, which competitive exam are you targeting? JEE, NEET, ya koi aur exam?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: I'm preparing for JEE Main. Engineering mein interest hai mera.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Excellent choice! JEE Main ke liye humara JEE Lakshya 2027 batch bilkul perfect hai aapke liye. Complete comprehensive course hai with live classes, recorded lectures, and practice tests. Aapka exam kab hai exactly?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: JEE Main toh next year January mein hai, so around 10 months left hai preparation ke liye.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Haan bilkul, 10 months is good time agar systematic preparation karenge toh. Saurabh, currently aap koi coaching attend kar rahe hain ya self-study kar rahe hain?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Actually, local coaching join kiya tha but teacher acha nahi hai. So I'm looking for better options now.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: I understand your concern. PW mein hmare top faculty hain like Alakh Sir jo Physics ko bilkul easy banate hain. JEE Lakshya 2027 mein complete syllabus coverage, daily practice questions, aur doubt clearing sessions bhi hain. Are you interested to know more about the course structure?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Yes, please tell me about it. But I'm also concerned about the fees. Local coaching is already expensive.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Theek hai, main batati hun. JEE Lakshya 2027 is our premium batch with live classes, recorded content, test series, aur personal mentorship. The course fee is ₹35,999 for complete package. But Saurabh, hum EMI options bhi provide karte hain!

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: ₹35,999 sounds quite expensive for my family. Can you tell me about EMI options? Kya monthly payment kar sakte hain?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Bilkul! We offer 0% EMI starting at just ₹3,499 per month through PW Pay. That's less than what most families spend on daily chai and snacks! No hidden charges, no interest. Aur agar budget tight hai toh JEE Arjuna 2027 batch bhi hai at ₹19,999 with EMI of ₹1,999 per month.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: ₹1,999 per month sounds more manageable. What's the difference between Lakshya and Arjuna batch?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Good question! Lakshya has live classes with top faculty, personal mentorship, aur premium doubt support. Arjuna mein recorded lectures with live doubt sessions hain, complete test series, aur study material. Both cover full JEE syllabus, but Lakshya mein more personalized attention milta hai.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Hmm, Arjuna batch seems suitable for me. But I need to discuss with my parents before taking any decision. Can you call me back tomorrow?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Of course! Family discussion is important for such decisions. Main kal same time call karungi. Saurabh, meanwhile aap PW app download kar sakte hain to check our free content and teaching style. Would that work for you?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Yes, that sounds good. I'll check the app and discuss with parents. What time should I expect your call tomorrow?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: I'll call you tomorrow around 11 AM, is that convenient? Aur agar koi urgent questions hain toh you can WhatsApp me on this number. Take your time to discuss and check our content.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: 11 AM tomorrow works perfectly. Thank you for explaining everything clearly, Priya. I'll definitely check the app today.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: You're most welcome, Saurabh! I'm confident that PW will help you crack JEE with flying colors. All the best, aur kal baat karte hain. Have a great day!

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Thank you so much! Looking forward to your call tomorrow. Have a good day, Priya!
